name: Allantoin
description: An effective soothing and anti-irritant agent that promotes skin healing.
scientificSummary: A keratolytic agent that increases the water content of the extracellular matrix and enhances the desquamation of dead skin cells.
mechanismOfAction: Stimulates cell regeneration and provides anti-inflammatory benefits to calm the skin.

seo.title: Allantoin - Soothing & Healing Properties | Dew Theory
seo.description: Find out why Allantoin is a must-have for sensitive skin and post-procedure care.
